description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The exterior features large floor-to-ceiling windows on multiple sides, allowing for ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The interior is divided into several rooms, including a visible garage with a car, bedrooms, a living area, and a kitchen, all separated by interior walls. The garage is attached and accessible from the main structure, with a prominent garage door on the front facade. The walls appear to be constructed from concrete or plaster, with some sections showing exposed brickwork for added texture. The overall design is minimalist, with a focus on open spaces and functional living areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with large windows, a flat roof, and an attached garage. The design is minimalist with open, well-lit interiors and a clean exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the garage with a car inside.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, interior room divisions, and partial visibility of the living spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back windows, garage door, and a clear view of the room layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows and the arrangement of interior rooms.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large floor-to-ceiling windows on multiple sides
